steps.title: Identify the starting value
steps.content: At $x=0$, the condo is worth $186{,}000$, so the function must start with $186{,}000$.

steps.title: Convert the percent increase to a multiplier
steps.content: A $3.1\%$ increase means each year the value is multiplied by $$1+0.031=1.031.$$

steps.title: Choose the matching function
steps.content: After $x$ years, the value is $$f(x)=186{,}000(1.031)^x.$$ The model uses the correct growth multiplier. C is correct.
